name: Requirements Analyst AI Agent
description: Built an AI-powered engineering skill designed to shift quality assurance and product discovery completely to the left.This custom agentic workflow transforms messy, unstructured stakeholder inputs into rigorous, testable, and gap-analyzed technical specifications before development or QA planning begins.

name: Test Data Generator using LLM
description: Test Data Generator is a tool that helps developers generate realistic test data for their applications, making it easier to test and validate functionality.

name: Playwright Authentication Recipes
description: A comprehensive, production-ready reference architecture demonstrating scalable authentication strategies in Playwright using TypeScript.

name: API Security Testing
description: This project provides an automation-ready framework to identify and test for the OWASP API Security Top 10 vulnerabilities. Utilizing a curated Postman collection and environment, it simulates real-world attacks against the intentionally vulnerable OWASP crAPI application.

name: API Performance Testing
description: This performance testing approach leverages Locust,to simulate realistic user traffic on APIs. By using a custom load shape to understand how APIs perform under dynamic load conditions.
